revision.comment: adding {{[[template:link note|link note]]}} formatting to match the style of {{[[Template:Subscription required|subscription required]]}} and others
revision.text: {{#if:{{{via|}}}| – via {{{via}}}{{Spaces|1}}|}}{{link note|note={{#switch:{{lc:{{{1}}} }} |#default= subscription may be required or content may be available in libraries |s |sentence= Subscription may be required or content may be available in libraries. |no-lib |no-libs |no-libraries= subscription may be required |no-lib-sentence |no-libs-sentence |no-libraries-sentence=Subscription may be required. |via=(THIS TEMPLATE APPEARS TO HAVE A MISUSED "via" PARAMETER LACKING A PLAIN EQUALS SIGN AND A VALUE.) |uk= subscription may be required or content may be available in libraries that are in the UK |uk-sentence=Subscription may be required or content may be available in libraries that are in the UK |us= subscription may be required or content may be available in libraries that are in the U.S. |us-sentence=Subscription may be required or content may be available in libraries that are in the U.S. }}}}[[Category:Pages containing links to subscription-or-libraries content]]{{Documentation}}
